figures.caption: Fig. 1. Monthly Information Coefficients Over Time. Blue bars: in-sample (2015–2022); red bars: out-of-sample (2023+). Black line: six-month rolling average. In-sample mean IC = 0.099; OOS mean IC = 0.115. The signal is positive in 85% of months and strengthens out-of-sample.
